name: Ken Haas
headline: Enterprise technology leader building governed AI operations
summary: Executive technology leader with 19+ years across cloud, cybersecurity, data, AI, customer success, and enterprise transformation. Ken focuses on practical adoption: aligning people, platforms, partners, and governance so large organizations can turn technology into durable business outcomes.

highlights.label: Enterprise scale
highlights.text: Led customer success and transformation programs for financial-market clients across cloud, security, data, AI, and modern work.

highlights.label: Governed AI
highlights.text: Builds human-in-the-loop automation patterns that keep sensitive work reviewable, auditable, and tied to real outcomes.

highlights.label: Recognition
highlights.text: Microsoft Platinum Club 2023 recipient for client growth, partner-led impact, and community leadership.

highlights.label: Community
highlights.text: Co-founder of Building Future Enterprises, supporting underrepresented groups navigating corporate and startup paths.

timeline.focus: Azure, Modern Work, Dynamics, cybersecurity, data, AI, and adoption strategy for top-tier financial-market customers.

timeline.role: Customer Success, Cloud, Security, and Enterprise Architecture Leadership
timeline.focus: Led cloud, security, data, customer success, technical sales, and enterprise architecture teams across North America and worldwide roles.
Nonprofit community work focused on helping underrepresented groups navigate business, corporate, and startup environments.

education: MBA, University of North Carolina Kenan-Flagler Business School
BS, Business Administration and Computer Science, Furman University
